έΑΟ έΑΟ έΑΟ (After the events of Devil May Cry 3)

You have been a demon hunter for a long time, carrying out assignments from a low profile. After the Temen-Ni-Gru incident, the city has been infested with the infernals, so you've had your hands full.

However, on one of your missions, you seem to be intercepted by someone unexpected, who apparently keeps the same job as you.
